metadata.title: VectorizableItem — universal container for vectorization input

description: Universal container for anything that can be vectorized (src/shared/models/vector_models.py). VectorizableItem is the input to VectorIndexService; EmbeddingPayload (governed separately) is the strict output stored in Qdrant. The pipeline is: domain object → VectorizableItem.payload (dict[str, Any]) → EmbeddingPayload (strict Pydantic) → Qdrant. The dict[str, Any] middle hop is a drift surface — payload keys that don't map to EmbeddingPayload fields are silently dropped or cause runtime errors. __post_init__ runtime validates non-empty item_id, non-empty text, and dict type for payload. IndexResult (sibling: item_id, point_id, vector_dim) is also in this file. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 Session 1.

item_id.description: Unique identifier for this vectorizable item. Must be non-empty (enforced by __post_init__).

text.description: Text content to be vectorized. Must be non-empty (enforced by __post_init__).

payload.description: Structured metadata payload (dict[str, Any]). Passed to EmbeddingPayload at the vectorization boundary. Keys should conform to EmbeddingPayload's required fields to avoid silent drift into Qdrant.
